ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the participant */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., sitting, standing, walking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" TEXT /* Calorie burn rate for the activity */,
  "energy_expenditure" TEXT /* Energy expenditure for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postures" (
  "posture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each posture */,
  "posture_name" TEXT /* Name of the posture (e.g., sitting, standing, lying down) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the posture */,
  "associated_risks" TEXT /* Associated health risks for the posture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_habits" (
  "smoking_habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking habit */,
  "smoking_habit_name" TEXT /* Name of the smoking habit (e.g., left-puff, right-puff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the smoking habit */,
  "nicotine_level" TEXT /* Nicotine level for the smoking habit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the participant during the activity */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the participant during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posture_logs" (
  "posture_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each posture log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "posture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the posture */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the posture */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the posture */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the posture */,
  "associated_risks" TEXT /* Associated health risks for the posture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posture_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posture_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_logs" (
  "smoking_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "smoking_habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoking habit */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the smoking habit */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the smoking habit */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the smoking habit */,
  "cigarettes_smoked" INTEGER /* Number of cigarettes smoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_posture_logs" (
  "activity_posture_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-posture log */,
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity log */,
  "posture_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the posture log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_posture_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_posture_logs_posture_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("posture_log_id") REFERENCES posture_logs ("posture_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_posture_logs_activity_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_log_id") REFERENCES activity_logs ("activity_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_smoking_logs" (
  "activity_smoking_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-smoking log */,
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity log */,
  "smoking_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoking log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_smoking_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_smoking_logs_smoking_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("smoking_log_id") REFERENCES smoking_logs ("smoking_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_smoking_logs_activity_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_log_id") REFERENCES activity_logs ("activity_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posture_smoking_logs" (
  "posture_smoking_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each posture-smoking log */,
  "posture_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the posture log */,
  "smoking_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoking log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posture_smoking_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posture_smoking_logs_posture_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("posture_log_id") REFERENCES posture_logs ("posture_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posture_smoking_logs_smoking_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("smoking_log_id") REFERENCES smoking_logs ("smoking_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_reports" (
  "activity_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity report */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the participant during the activity */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the participant during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_reports_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posture_reports" (
  "posture_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each posture report */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "posture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the posture */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the posture */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the posture */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the posture */,
  "associated_risks" TEXT /* Associated health risks for the posture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posture_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posture_reports_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_reports" (
  "smoking_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking report */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "smoking_habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoking habit */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the smoking habit */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the smoking habit */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the smoking habit */,
  "cigarettes_smoked" INTEGER /* Number of cigarettes smoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_reports_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "research_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_team_members" (
  "research_team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team member */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_data" (
  "research_project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project data */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data collected for the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_data_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("research_project_id")
)
